title: Neko's Enchanted Books
description: Gives every Enchanted Book in Minecraft a unique texture!
body:
![Image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/441114/description_0d1b08a3-1170-4e73-acd6-bd46783da875.png)
Neko's Enchanted Books is a small mod for Forge that adds unique textures to every Enchanted Book in vanilla Minecraft!

Additionally, the mod also shares compatibility with...

- Advent of Ascension 3
- Alex's Mobs
- Allurement
- Apotheosis
- BetterDefaultBiomes
- BetterEnd (Forge)
- Big Brain
- Brooms
- Charm
- Corpse Complex
- Create
- Elenai Dodge 2
- Ensorcellation
- Farmer's Delight
- Fins and Tails
- Greed N' Bleed
- Jellyfishing
- Locks
- Ma Enchants
- Mining Master
- Momentum
- Seeker's Compass
- Shulker Enchantments
- Step, Leap, Dash
- Supplementaries
- VanillaTweaks
- Veinmining
- Wall-Jump!
- Wonderful Enchantments

If you want more compatibility, you can fork the project yourself and PR it back to me on GitHub! https://github.com/CGessinger/Nekos-Enchanted-Books

CurseForge mirror: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/nekos-enchanted-books
